scope: Compact daisyUI-based app shell spec. Main content is mock-only; focus is shell, navigation, compact topbar, component consistency, tokens, states, and implementation classes.

guidingPrinciples: Prefer daisyUI semantic classes over one-off Tailwind color utilities.
Use daisyUI component size modifiers such as btn-sm, input-sm, menu-sm, and card-compact before custom sizing.
Keep app-shell density consistent by aligning nav rows, search, icon buttons, avatars, and cards to one compact rhythm.
Use custom theme variables for brand expression instead of hardcoded component overrides.

daisyTheme.name: lumina
daisyTheme.strategy: Map Lumina brand colors into daisyUI semantic theme tokens.

densitySystem.coreRule: Use daisyUI small variants first, then use minimal Tailwind spacing utilities for layout only.
consistencyRules: All desktop nav rows use h-9 or h-10.
All icon-only controls use btn-sm btn-square.
All cards in shell-adjacent areas use card-compact.
Avoid mixing p-5, p-6, gap-6, or h-14 in the shell.

topbar.className: navbar min-h-14 h-14 border-b border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-3
structure: navbar-start: optional mobile drawer trigger and desktop page context

content.note: Main content can be mocked. Shell spacing should not depend on content.

layout.headerClass: navbar min-h-16 h-16 border-b border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-3

topbar.behavior: Use the same daisyUI navbar pattern as desktop, not a separate oversized hero header.

DesktopSidebar.className: flex min-h-full w-68 flex-col gap-3 border-r border-base-300 bg-base-200 p-3

menu.sectionTitleClass: menu-title px-2 py-1 text-[0.6875rem] uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-base-content/55

bookItem.className: grid grid-cols-[1.75rem_1fr] items-center gap-2 rounded-field px-2 py-1.5

footer.linksClass: flex flex-wrap gap-x-3 gap-y-1 px-2 text-xs text-base-content/60

CompactTopbar.intent: More compact than the previous top nav while preserving daisyUI structure.
CompactTopbar.className: navbar min-h-14 h-14 border-b border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-3

navbarStart.desktopContent: Optional route title or collapsed drawer button.
navbarStart.mobileContent: Drawer trigger plus compact Lumina brand.
navbarStart.brandClass: btn btn-sm btn-ghost px-2 font-serif text-xl font-bold text-primary normal-case

navbarCenter.searchInputClass: input input-sm input-bordered w-full rounded-field pl-8 text-sm
navbarCenter.searchIconClass: pointer-events-none absolute left-2.5 top-1/2 size-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-base-content/50

navbarEnd.dropdownMenuClass: menu menu-sm dropdown-content z-50 mt-2 w-48 rounded-box bg-base-100 p-2 shadow border border-base-300

mobileSearch.behavior: Search is a bottom-tab destination by default. Do not place a full search input in the mobile topbar unless the user is on the Search route.

BottomNavigation.fallbackDaisyPattern: btm-nav if dock is unavailable in the installed daisyUI version
BottomNavigation.className: dock dock-sm z-40 border-t border-base-300 bg-base-100 lg:hidden

SearchInput.desktopClass: input input-sm input-bordered w-full rounded-field pl-8
SearchInput.guideline: Use input-sm instead of custom height. Use pl-8 only when a search icon is present.

AvatarDropdown.menuClass: menu menu-sm dropdown-content z-50 mt-2 w-48 rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-2 shadow

ShellCard.className: card card-compact rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 shadow-none
ShellCard.guideline: Use only for shell-adjacent panels such as dropdown previews, mini lists, and account panels. Main content may define its own card rhythm later.

PrimaryAction.guideline: Use btn-sm for shell actions. Reserve default btn size for main content actions.

desktop.sidebar: Always visible at lg and above using drawer lg:drawer-open.
desktop.topbar: Always compact h-14. Search is centered and capped at max-w-xl.
desktop.content: Begins directly below topbar. Avoid extra shell padding unless content needs it.

tablet.topbar: Same h-14 compact navbar with drawer trigger.
tablet.search: Show search input if width allows; otherwise show search icon route.

mobile.sidebar: Hidden behind drawer or replaced by bottom dock.
mobile.topbar: Compact h-16 navbar with brand, notification, profile.
mobile.search: Search as tab route, not permanent topbar field.

topbar.transparent: not recommended for Lumina app shell because compact shell needs clear structure

dropdown.open: dropdown-content menu menu-sm rounded-box bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300

loading.shell: Render navbar, sidebar, and bottom dock immediately.
loading.content: Use skeleton only inside main content, not in shell chrome.

offline.desktop: Small badge badge-outline badge-sm near footer.
offline.mobile: Toast above dock using alert alert-info alert-soft if needed.

aria.activePage: Use aria-current='page' on active menu and dock items.
aria.iconOnlyButtons: Every btn-square or btn-circle needs aria-label.
aria.dropdownTrigger: Use aria-haspopup='menu' and aria-expanded when controlled.
aria.drawerToggle: Use a labelled checkbox/button pattern compatible with daisyUI drawer.

keyboard.escape: Closes dropdown, drawer, or search suggestions.

contrast.rule: Functional text should use base-content/70 or stronger. Avoid base-content/40 for nav labels.
contrast.primaryAction: Use btn-primary so text uses primary-content.

desktopAndMobileShell.navbar: navbar sticky top-0 z-30 min-h-14 h-14 border-b border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-3
desktopAndMobileShell.mobileDock: dock dock-sm border-t border-base-300 bg-base-100 lg:hidden

topbarExampleClasses.navbar: navbar min-h-14 h-14 border-b border-base-300 bg-base-100 px-3
topbarExampleClasses.brand: btn btn-sm btn-ghost px-2 font-serif text-xl font-bold normal-case text-primary
topbarExampleClasses.searchInput: input input-sm input-bordered w-full rounded-field pl-8
topbarExampleClasses.dropdownMenu: menu menu-sm dropdown-content z-50 mt-2 w-48 rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-2 shadow

sidebarExampleClasses.aside: min-h-full w-68 border-r border-base-300 bg-base-200 p-3
sidebarExampleClasses.sectionTitle: menu-title px-2 py-1 text-[0.6875rem] uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-base-content/55

do: Use navbar min-h-14 h-14 for desktop top nav.
Use input-sm and btn-sm in the shell.
Use menu menu-sm for sidebar and dropdown menus.
Use semantic classes: bg-base-100, bg-base-200, border-base-300, text-primary, btn-primary.
Keep avatar at w-8 in the topbar.
Use card-compact for dropdown and shell cards.
dont: Do not use h-20, p-6, gap-6, or large search fields in the app shell.
Do not override every daisyUI component height manually.
Do not hardcode bg-[#3A5A6B] where btn-primary or text-primary works.
Do not create separate sizing systems for sidebar, topbar, and bottom nav.
Do not place full-width mobile search in the topbar unless the current route is Search.
